Metadata.title: Restaugenda - Restaurant Profitability Tracker
Metadata.description: Track your restaurant's product profitability with ease

Landing.trialBadge: 1 month free trial — no credit card required
Landing.heroDescription: Know exactly which products make you money. Calculate profit margins, track sales, and make data-driven decisions for your restaurant or bar.
Landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to maximize profits
Landing.featuresSubtitle: Simple tools that give you powerful insights
Landing.featureProductDescription: Track cost price and selling price for every item. See profit and margin at a glance.
Landing.featureSalesDescription: Log daily sales and instantly see your total revenue and profit across all products.
Landing.featureMarginDescription: Instantly see which products have high (green) or low (red) profit margins so you can act fast.
Landing.ctaTitle: Ready to boost your restaurant's profits?
Landing.ctaDescription: Join hundreds of restaurants and bars already using Restaugenda.

Signup.title: Create your account
Signup.subtitle: 1 month free — no credit card required
Signup.confirmationSent: We've sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Start with a free trial. No credit card required.
Pricing.freeTrialDescription: Try everything free for 30 days. No credit card required.
Pricing.monthlyDescription: Perfect for growing restaurants and bars.
Pricing.yearlyDescription: Best value — save ~17% compared to monthly.

Dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your restaurant's performance
